name: mbi-root-orchestrator
description: Orchestrates MLM, MindBotics, Bm2_Backend, and Global Proxy

scripts.docker:all:up: docker compose -f ./MLM/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f ./MindBotics/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f ./Bm2_Backend/docker-compose.yaml up -d && sleep 5 && docker compose -f ./proxy/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.docker:all:down: docker compose -f ./proxy/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f ./Bm2_Backend/docker-compose.yaml down && docker compose -f ./MindBotics/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f ./MLM/docker-compose.yml down
